title: Spicy Korean Tofu Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with crispy tofu, spicy Korean chili flakes, and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the tofu from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and snow peas to the skillet.
Cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the ginger and garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the tofu to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the tofu is coated in the sauce.
Season with fiery Korean chili flakes to taste.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving dish and drizzle with sesame oil.
